images.name: Austin Simmons [1296x729]
images.caption: At 19, Simmons -- a two-sport star -- has already graduated from Ole Miss, but is getting his first chance to start at quarterback.

images.name: Ole Miss' Austin Simmons emphasizes being 'calm in the storm'
images.caption: Simmons explains how his preparation and prior experience in the Rebels' offense is gearing him up to make a seamless transition to the starting role at quarterback.

videos.description: Tyrrell Pigrome attempts to mount a Maryland comeback but throws an interception to Reese Taylor to clinch Indiana's win.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Indiana seals win with late INT) 2019/10/19

videos.headline: Indiana seals win with late INT

videos.description: Michael Penix Jr. airs it out to Donavan Hale for the 28-yard score to put Indiana on the board against Maryland.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Indiana strikes first with a 28-yard touchdown) 2019/10/19

videos.headline: Indiana strikes first with a 28-yard touchdown

videos.description: Tyrrell Pigrome and Maryland answer Indiana with a 11-yard touchdown pass to Chigoziem Okonkwo.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Pigrome fires a TD pass to Okonkwo) 2019/10/19

videos.headline: Pigrome fires a TD pass to Okonkwo

videos.description: Stevie Scott III bulldozes for the three-yard touchdown to put Indiana back on top.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Scott muscles into the end zone for a TD) 2019/10/19

videos.headline: Scott muscles into the end zone for a TD

videos.description: Indiana head coach Tom Allen slaps some helmets on the sideline after the Hoosiers force a turnover on downs in the first quarter.
videos.headline: Indiana's head coach gets fired up after 4th-down stop

videos.description: Tyrrell Pigrome makes the easy throw to Dontay Demus Jr. for the 15-yard touchdown.
videos.headline: Pigrome delivers another TD pass

videos.description: Peyton Ramsey throws one for the end zone to a diving Nick Westbrook for the 26-yard Hoosiers score.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Westbrook lays out for the terrific Indiana TD) 2019/10/19

videos.headline: Westbrook lays out for the terrific Indiana TD

videos.description: Stevie Scott III fights his way for a touchdown on a nine-yard run to increase Indiana's lead.
videos.headline: Scott spins into the end zone for the Hoosiers' TD
